ea_dispatch.phase_name: Stage 6 Phase 3 — Governance Documentation and Stage 3 Posterity

comprehension_gate.rule: Present CG1–CG7. Do NOT begin work. Do NOT call any tool. Await APPROVED verdict. If APPROVED_WITH_ADJUSTMENTS, apply adjustments verbatim before Step 0.

required_sections.section: In 3–5 sentences: what Tickets A (id 282) and X (id 289) require; which ticket is doc-only vs. which touches existing files; why GUIDE_HANDOFF_LATEST.xml is NOT in Phase 3 EA-12 scope (Co-Lead Phase 3 responsibility, not EA); that the 24-ticket hardening backlog will decrease by 2 open (A + X closed), net 38→39 total after Phase 3 tracking task creation.

Check 0a — .platform/ exactly 2 entries (audit_archive/, vikunja_project_ids.yaml). Check 0b (CORRECTED per Phase 2 dispatch correction): Run git tag --list on BOTH repos. BlarAI expected: exactly pre-platform-extract + post-platform-extract (2 tags, no third). devplatform expected: platform-extracted at ae75507 present. HARD STOP if BlarAI shows a third extraction tag or devplatform tag is absent. Check 0c — BlarAI main HEAD 15d68d8; devplatform main HEAD 71436e7. Working tree: BlarAI has 9 .claude/agents/*.md ' D' unstaged deletions (LA WIP, expected, untouched). devplatform has 2 untracked stale flag files in tools/fleet_observability/ (expected, untouched). HARD STOP on any HEAD mismatch or unexpected staged changes. Check 0d — fleet_paused=false at boot.

State the exact 4-step execution plan, file by file:
Step A-1: Grep for the escalation-watchdog typo. Command: Select-String -Path "C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\docs\platform_separation\INFRA_DELTA_v2.md" -Pattern "escalation-watchdog" (hyphen variant) If found: fix in-place (replace hyphen with underscore). INFRA_DELTA_v2.md is a reference spec, not a frozen verdict file; amendment permitted. Stage as part of commit 2. If not found: note "typo not found in INFRA_DELTA_v2.md; already corrected or never present." Also grep the 4 verdict files for the same pattern (read-only — do NOT edit them if found there; note any occurrences in the posterity doc for audit trail).
Step A-2: Grep all 4 frozen verdict files for g7-ea1_n instances. Files (exact paths under BlarAI/docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/): - 3.0.v2-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_STAGE3_COMPREHENSIVE_AUDIT_CHECKPOINT.xml - 3.1.v2-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_ITEM_3_1_V2_VERIFIED_SPEC_CORRECTION_AUTHORIZED.xml - 3.2.v2-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_ITEM_3_2_V2_RECLASSIFICATION_REQUIRED_SELECTIVE_COPY_AUTHORIZED.xml - 3.10-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_STAGE3_CLOSE_VERIFIED.xml Command (per file): Select-String -Path "<file>" -Pattern "g7-ea1_n" | Select-Object LineNumber, Line These files are frozen (no-amend doctrine dn30). Do NOT edit them. Collect all instances: file, line number, full ack-atom text.
Step A-3: Create posterity correction doc. Path: BlarAI/docs/platform_separation/A_STAGE3_EA_NUMBERING_POSTERITY.md Content (minimum): - Header: "Stage 3 EA-Numbering Posterity Correction" - Origin: Anomaly A12 (EA-numbering defect); per no-amend doctrine dn30, verdict files 3.0.v2 / 3.1.v2 / 3.2.v2 / 3.10 are not retroactively edited. - Cross-reference table: for each g7-ea1_n* instance found in Step A-2, one row: File | Line | ack-atom text (verbatim from verdict) | Corrected ack ID (g7-ea7_n*) - Typo audit result (from Step A-1): whether escalation-watchdog was found and corrected. - Any other typos/spec-drift discovered during the read-only grep passes — listed here for record; corrections only in non-frozen files (INFRA_DELTA_v2.md, non-verdict XMLs). - Scope note: this document is the canonical correction artifact; it does not supersede the ack atoms in the frozen verdict files, which remain as originally emitted.
Step A-4: Commit the Ticket A deliverables on BlarAI main. Files: docs/platform_separation/A_STAGE3_EA_NUMBERING_POSTERITY.md (NEW) docs/platform_separation/INFRA_DELTA_v2.md (ONLY IF typo found in Step A-1) git add must name both files explicitly (or just the posterity doc if no INFRA_DELTA_v2.md edit). Message: docs(stage6_phase3): Ticket A -- Stage 3 EA-numbering posterity correction doc

Step X-1: Create the subagent verification protocol governance doc. Path: devplatform/docs/governance/subagent_verification_protocol.md Content (minimum): - Title: "Subagent Verification Protocol" - Origin: Anomaly A18 (Stage 4 dispatch audit; subagent verification false-negative); decision d8 in GUIDE_HANDOFF_LATEST.xml. - Core rule: A Guide instance MUST NOT accept an EA's claim about file state, commit content, diff stats, or test results without independent verification. Verification is not optional — it is part of every Guide cross-check pass. - Standard verification commands for common EA claims: Claimed file content → Read tool (or git show <SHA> -- <file>) Claimed commit stats → git show <SHA> --stat Claimed diff → git show <SHA> -- <file> (with + lines vs - lines) Claimed Vikunja state → mcp__vikunja__get_task(task_id) independently Claimed fleet state → Read devplatform/tools/autonomy_budget/state.json directly - Activation scope: all Guide-supervised EA executions from Stage 4 onward. - Note: GUIDE_HANDOFF_LATEST.xml update is NOT in EA-12 scope. The Co-Lead Phase 3 step at the next Guide transition will incorporate a reference to this document. EA-12 does not edit GUIDE_HANDOFF_LATEST.xml.
Step X-2: Commit on devplatform main. Files: docs/governance/subagent_verification_protocol.md (NEW) Message: docs(governance): Ticket X -- subagent verification protocol (A18 resolution)

| # | Repo | Files staged | Message | Skip condition | |---|---|---|---|---| | 1 | devplatform | tools/autonomy_budget/state.json | chore(ops): pause fleet -- Stage 6 Phase 3 governance+posterity -- EA-12 | None | | 2 | BlarAI | docs/platform_separation/A_STAGE3_EA_NUMBERING_POSTERITY.md [+ INFRA_DELTA_v2.md if typo found] | docs(stage6_phase3): Ticket A -- Stage 3 EA-numbering posterity correction doc | None | | 3 | devplatform | docs/governance/subagent_verification_protocol.md | docs(governance): Ticket X -- subagent verification protocol (A18 resolution) | None | | 4 | BlarAI | docs/platform_separation/STATUS.md | docs(stage6_phase3): record Phase 3 complete in STATUS.md (E11) | Deferred to Phase 4 if HARD STOP on both tickets | | 5 | devplatform | tools/autonomy_budget/state.json | chore(ops): unpause fleet -- Stage 6 Phase 3 governance+posterity -- EA-12 done | None — always runs |
Explicit-add only. git diff --staged verified before each commit. Standing artifacts untouched (9 BlarAI .claude/agents/*.md ' D' deletions; 2 devplatform tools/fleet_observability/*.flag files).

Commit 4 makes two edits to STATUS.md:
Edit (a) — Stage 6 table row: update devplatform and BlarAI commit columns and Key Evidence. Current after Phase 2: | 6 Hardening | IN-PROGRESS | | devplatform Phase 2 SHAs | BlarAI 15d68d8 | Items 6.4+6.5 complete; ... | New: | 6 Hardening | IN-PROGRESS | 2026-05-07 | devplatform <3+5 SHAs> | BlarAI <2+4 SHAs> | Items 6.4+6.5+TicketA+TicketX complete; 6.1-6.3/6.6 DEFERRED; 6.7-6.10 pending |
Edit (b) — §11 evolution: append E11 after E10 block. Content: **E11 — Stage 6 Phase 3 (Tickets A+X) complete** (devplatform commits 1+3+5-SHAs, BlarAI commits 2+4-SHAs, 2026-05-07): Ticket A — Stage 3 EA-numbering posterity correction published at docs/platform_separation/A_STAGE3_EA_NUMBERING_POSTERITY.md; g7-ea1_n* → g7-ea7_n* cross-reference table covers N instances across 4 frozen verdict files; INFRA_DELTA_v2.md [typo corrected / typo not found]. Ticket X — devplatform/docs/governance/subagent_verification_protocol.md published (A18 resolution; standard verification commands for Guide cross-check passes). Hardening backlog: 39 total / 17 done / 22 open after Phase 3 tracking task close.
Fill in actual SHAs and counts once commits land.
Confirm each ack label (g10-ea12_n1 through g10-ea12_n9) with one sentence each. See §5 Required Acks for the full text.

context.repo_state: BlarAI main HEAD: 15d68d8 "docs(stage6_phase2): record Items 6.4+6.5 complete in STATUS.md (E10)" devplatform main HEAD: 71436e7 "chore(ops): unpause fleet -- Stage 6 Phase 2 items 6.4+6.5 -- EA-11 done" Fleet state: unpaused (fleet_paused=false, last_updated_utc=2026-05-07T21:10:10Z)
context.vikunja_state: Project 10 (DevPlatform-Meta) at Phase 3 boot: 38 total / 14 done / 24 open Tickets closed in Phase 3: A (id 282) + X (id 289) from hardening backlog Phase 3 tracking task: 1 new task created + closed = net +1 total / +1 done / open unchanged Expected Project 10 final state: 39 total / 17 done / 22 open Breakdown: +1 tracking task created (39 total / 14 done / 25 open) → close A: 39/15/24 → close X: 39/16/23 → close tracking task: 39/17/22
context.phase2_dispatch_corrections: Both corrections carry forward into Check 0b of this dispatch: 1. Check 0b: platform-extracted is a devplatform tag (ae75507); BlarAI has exactly 2 extraction tags (pre-platform-extract, post-platform-extract). Verify BOTH repos. 2. Item 6.5 sweep false-positive (_claude_projects_dirty.log): documented in E10, no further action needed. Not relevant to Phase 3 scope.
context.anomaly_A33_standing_workaround: complete_task SUSPENDED. All closes use Option B: get_task(id) → capture title/description/priority update_task(id, title=t, description=d, priority=p, done=True) Both title and done=True explicit on every close call. Fix tracked at Ticket WW (id 318, MEDIUM priority, open).
context.no_amend_doctrine: dn30: frozen verdict files are NEVER retroactively edited. Frozen in Phase 3 scope: 3.0.v2-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_STAGE3_COMPREHENSIVE_AUDIT_CHECKPOINT.xml 3.1.v2-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_ITEM_3_1_V2_VERIFIED_SPEC_CORRECTION_AUTHORIZED.xml 3.2.v2-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_ITEM_3_2_V2_RECLASSIFICATION_REQUIRED_SELECTIVE_COPY_AUTHORIZED.xml 3.10-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_STAGE3_CLOSE_VERIFIED.xml INFRA_DELTA_v2.md is a living reference spec — amendment permitted for typo correction.

check.on_fail: HARD STOP. Report actual contents to Guide-#10.

check.note: CORRECTED — checks both repos, not just BlarAI
check.on_fail: HARD STOP. Missing or unexpected extraction tag — report to Guide-#10.

check.expected: BlarAI HEAD: 15d68d8 devplatform HEAD: 71436e7 BlarAI working tree: 9 .claude/agents/*.md ' D' lines only. devplatform working tree: 2 untracked flag files only.
check.on_fail: HEAD mismatch or unexpected staged changes → HARD STOP; report to Guide-#10. New untracked files not in Phase 3 commit paths → note, not auto-stop.
HARD STOP. Investigate who holds the pause before proceeding.

step.name: Create Phase 3 Vikunja tracking task
step.task_spec: title: "Stage 6 Phase 3: Stage 3 posterity + subagent verification protocol (Tickets A+X)" project_id: 10 priority: 2 (MEDIUM) description: "EA-12 Phase 3 execution. Tickets in scope: A (id 282, Stage 3 EA-numbering posterity + INFRA_DELTA_v2.md typo) and X (id 289, subagent verification protocol governance doc). Documentation-only phase; no code or fleet-config changes. Reference: docs/platform_separation/07_STAGE6_HARDENING.xml." labels: [Active (id 1), Documentation (id 7)]
step.note: Capture the new task ID immediately. Reference it in all subsequent Vikunja comments.

step.name: Pause fleet
step.command: python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, r'C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform'); from tools.autonomy_budget import state; state.pause_fleet('Stage 6 Phase 3 governance+posterity -- EA-12', updated_by='ea_code', path='C:/Users/mrbla/devplatform/tools/autonomy_budget/state.json')"

commit.message: chore(ops): pause fleet -- Stage 6 Phase 3 governance+posterity -- EA-12

item.name: Stage 3 locked-artifact amendments + EA-numbering posterity

step.name: Typo audit — INFRA_DELTA_v2.md
step.if_found: Fix: replace escalation-watchdog with escalation_watchdog (exact occurrences only). Verify no other hyphen-vs-underscore defects in adjacent lines. Note: INFRA_DELTA_v2.md is a living spec — amendment permitted per §2 no_amend_doctrine.
step.if_not_found: Note "escalation-watchdog hyphen pattern not found in INFRA_DELTA_v2.md" in posterity doc.
step.also_grep_frozen_files: Run same pattern against the 4 verdict files (read-only): Select-String -Path "C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\docs\platform_separation\temp_for_responses\3.0.v2-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_STAGE3_COMPREHENSIVE_AUDIT_CHECKPOINT.xml" -Pattern "escalation-watchdog" [repeat for 3.1.v2, 3.2.v2, 3.10 files] If found: note occurrences in posterity doc for audit trail. Do NOT edit verdict files.

step.name: g7-ea1_n* grep in frozen verdict files
step.instruction: For each of the 4 frozen verdict files, run: Select-String -Path "<file>" -Pattern "g7-ea1_n" | Select-Object LineNumber, Line Collect all results: file shortname, line number, full ack text (the line content). These instances form the cross-reference table in the posterity doc. Do NOT edit the verdict files.

step.name: Create posterity correction doc
step.required_content: 1. Header: "Stage 3 EA-Numbering Posterity Correction (Ticket A)" 2. Origin: "Anomaly A12 — EA-numbering defect. Stage 3 verdict files used g7-ea1_n* (reflecting the first EA spawned for Stage 3) but the correct global identifier is g7-ea7_n* (EA-7 in the cumulative cross-session count, per feedback_ea_numbering_global.md). Per no-amend doctrine (dn30), the verdict files are not retroactively edited. This document is the canonical correction artifact." 3. Cross-reference table: one row per g7-ea1_n* instance found in Step A-2: File | Line | ack-atom text (verbatim) | Corrected ID Example row: 3.0.v2-GUIDE_RESPONSE... | 42 | "g7-ea1_n1: ..." | g7-ea7_n1 4. Typo audit results (from Step A-1): INFRA_DELTA_v2.md status + frozen file grep. 5. Scope note: "This document supersedes no prior artifact. The frozen verdict files remain as originally emitted. Callers who encounter g7-ea1_n* in Stage 3 verdict files should resolve via this table." 6. Reference: STATUS.md Anomaly A12; EA-numbering feedback memory.

step.name: Commit Ticket A deliverables on BlarAI
step.files_to_stage: docs/platform_separation/A_STAGE3_EA_NUMBERING_POSTERITY.md (always) docs/platform_separation/INFRA_DELTA_v2.md (only if typo fix was made in Step A-1)
step.message: docs(stage6_phase3): Ticket A -- Stage 3 EA-numbering posterity correction doc
step.verify: git diff --staged before commit; only the listed files staged.

item.vikunja_close: After commit from Step A-4: 1. add_task_comment(282, "Phase 3 execution complete. A_STAGE3_EA_NUMBERING_POSTERITY.md created at docs/platform_separation/. Cross-reference table covers [N] g7-ea1_n* instances across 4 verdict files. INFRA_DELTA_v2.md [typo corrected / typo not found]. BlarAI commit <SHA>.") 2. get_task(282) → capture title, description, priority. 3. update_task(282, title=t, description=d, priority=p, done=True) [Option B — A33 workaround] 4. get_task(282) → verify done=true, description preserved.

item.name: Subagent verification protocol formalization

step.name: Create governance doc on devplatform
step.required_content: 1. Title: "Subagent Verification Protocol" 2. Status: Active (effective Stage 4 onward) 3. Origin: Anomaly A18 (Stage 4 dispatch audit, subagent verification false-negative); decision d8 in GUIDE_HANDOFF_LATEST.xml. 4. Core rule: "A Guide instance MUST independently verify every substantive EA claim before accepting it. Verification is not optional. Accepting an EA's claim about file state, commit content, diff stats, or test results without cross-checking is a protocol violation." 5. Standard verification commands by claim type: EA claims file content → Read tool directly, OR git show <SHA> -- <file> EA claims commit stats → git show <SHA> --stat EA claims diff is exactly X → git show <SHA> -- <file> (inspect + / - lines) EA claims Vikunja task state → mcp__vikunja__get_task(task_id) independently EA claims fleet is unpaused → Read devplatform/tools/autonomy_budget/state.json EA claims working tree clean → git -C <repo> status --short (run on both repos) 6. Escalation: if cross-check contradicts EA claim, issue REJECTED verdict with evidence. Do not accept EA's explanation without re-running the verification command. 7. Scope: applies to all Guide instances (Guide-#7 onward, retroactively; new protocol in all Guide handoff briefs from this commit onward). 8. Note: GUIDE_HANDOFF_LATEST.xml incorporation is at the next Co-Lead Phase 3 step (Guide transition), not by this EA.

step.name: Commit Ticket X deliverable on devplatform
step.message: docs(governance): Ticket X -- subagent verification protocol (A18 resolution)
step.verify: git diff --staged before commit; only the governance doc staged.

item.vikunja_close: After commit from Step X-2: 1. add_task_comment(289, "Phase 3 execution complete. subagent_verification_protocol.md created at devplatform/docs/governance/. Core rule + standard verification commands documented. GUIDE_HANDOFF_LATEST.xml incorporation at next Co-Lead Phase 3 Guide transition (not EA-12 scope). devplatform commit <SHA>.") 2. get_task(289) → capture title, description, priority. 3. update_task(289, title=t, description=d, priority=p, done=True) [Option B — A33 workaround] 4. get_task(289) → verify done=true, description preserved.

item.name: STATUS.md E11 evolution entry + Stage 6 table
item.instruction: After both Ticket A and Ticket X commits land, update STATUS.md in a single BlarAI commit. Two edits: (a) Stage 6 table row: update devplatform and BlarAI commit SHA columns; update Key Evidence to read "Items 6.4+6.5+TicketA+TicketX complete; 6.1-6.3/6.6 DEFERRED; 6.7-6.10 pending". (b) §11 evolution: append E11 entry after E10. Fill actual SHAs and counts.

commit.message: docs(stage6_phase3): record Phase 3 complete in STATUS.md (E11)

item.skip_condition: If both Tickets A and X hit HARD STOPs (unlikely for doc-only work), defer this commit and close report as PARTIAL. Fleet must still be unpaused via Post-Flight.

required_acks.ack: BlarAI main HEAD is 15d68d8 (Phase 2 STATUS.md commit); devplatform main HEAD is 71436e7 (Phase 2 unpause). Any deviation → HARD STOP with actual HEADs reported to Guide-#10.

Check 0b runs git tag --list on BOTH repos. BlarAI expected: pre-platform-extract + post-platform-extract (2 extraction tags, no third). devplatform expected: platform-extracted at ae75507. The dispatch error from Phase 2 (checking only BlarAI) is corrected here.
The unpause function is resume_fleet() — NOT unpause_fleet() (raises AttributeError). sys.path.insert(0, r'C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform') required before import.

Ticket A no-amend constraint: verdict files 3.0.v2 / 3.1.v2 / 3.2.v2 / 3.10 are frozen per dn30. They are grepped read-only; results go into the posterity doc. Only INFRA_DELTA_v2.md (living spec) may be edited, and only if the typo is present.

Ticket X deliverable is devplatform/docs/governance/subagent_verification_protocol.md only. GUIDE_HANDOFF_LATEST.xml is NOT edited by EA-12; that is Co-Lead Phase 3 responsibility at the next Guide transition.
A33 standing workaround: complete_task suspended. All closes (Ticket A, Ticket X, Phase 3 tracking task) use Option B: get_task → update_task(title, description, priority, done=True).
Explicit-add discipline: git add names exact filenames; git add . and git add -A never used; git diff --staged verified before each commit.
Standing artifacts untouched: 9 BlarAI .claude/agents/*.md ' D' deletions and 2 devplatform tools/fleet_observability/ flag files. Neither set is staged or remediated in Phase 3.

Phase 3 Vikunja tracking task created in Project 10 at Step 0.5 before fleet pause. Closed via Option B at PF1 after commit 4 (STATUS.md). PF1 is PASS-path only: if Phase 3 is partial (HARD STOP), add comment to tracking task and leave open, per AOAM §4.

step.name: Close or comment Phase 3 tracking task
step.pass_path: get_task(tracking_task_id) → capture fields. update_task(tracking_task_id, title=t, description=d, priority=p, done=True). Verify: get_task → done=true, fields preserved.
step.partial_path: add_task_comment with "Phase 3 PARTIAL — [explanation]. Awaiting Guide-#10 disposition." Leave done=false. Do NOT call update_task with done=True.

step.name: Unpause fleet — ALWAYS RUNS
step.command: python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, r'C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform'); from tools.autonomy_budget import state; state.resume_fleet(updated_by='ea_code', path='C:/Users/mrbla/devplatform/tools/autonomy_budget/state.json')"

commit.message: chore(ops): unpause fleet -- Stage 6 Phase 3 governance+posterity -- EA-12 done

exit_criteria.criterion: Step 0 PASS on all 4 checks (after any Guide-#10 dispositions).
A_STAGE3_EA_NUMBERING_POSTERITY.md exists at BlarAI/docs/platform_separation/; INFRA_DELTA_v2.md amended or confirmed clean; commit 2 on BlarAI main.
subagent_verification_protocol.md exists at devplatform/docs/governance/; commit 3 on devplatform main.
STATUS.md E11 entry appended + Stage 6 row updated; commit 4 on BlarAI main.
Ticket A (282) and Ticket X (289) both done=true in Vikunja, fields preserved. Project 10: 39 total / 17 done / 22 open.
Phase 3 tracking task closed or commented; unpause commit 5 on devplatform main; fleet_paused=false.
EA-12 emits Phase 3 close report with all commit SHAs, Vikunja mutation log, posterity doc cross-reference table summary, and EC1–EC7 checklist.
